text: Sharp insights on cybersecurity | Barracuda Networks Blog Subscribe to the blog to receive threat spotlights, industry commentary, and more.

Anthropic’s Claude Mythos: What organizations should do now to boost cyber resilience Anthropic’s Claude Mythos AI model highlights how artificial intelligence is accelerating cyberattacks by dramatically increasing the speed and scale of vulnerability discovery, exploit development and automated attacks. Strong foundational security controls are more critical than ever.

Organizations that prioritize automation, consistent control coverage, and resilient backup and recovery will be best positioned to withstand AI‑driven threats.
